children.heading: Migratory bird fines, penalties, forfeitures
children.label: b Migratory bird fines, penalties, forfeitures
children.text: The sums received under as penalties or fines, or from forfeitures of property are authorized to be appropriated to the Department of the Interior for purposes of allocation under . This subsection shall not be construed to require the sale of instrumentalities.section 707 of this titlesection 4407 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: In addition to the amounts made available under subsections (a) and (b) of this section, there are authorized to be appropriated to the Department of the Interior for purposes of allocation under not to exceed $60,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2030.section 4407 of this title

children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: d Availability of funds
children.text: Sums made available under this section shall be available until expended.
